item.title: Nail Your 5-Slide Screening Deck 🎨 • Start with a brief intro: name, title, and key skills. • Share a career overview: key roles and achievements. • Highlight a major project: scope, role, and impact. • Showcase skills: tie them to job requirements. • Conclude with future goals and eagerness for the role. How will you ensure your slides align with the job's core needs? #presentation #careerdevelopment #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Nail Your 5-Slide Screening Deck 🎨 • Start with a brief intro: name, title, and key skills. • Share a career overview: key roles and achievements. • Highlight a major project: scope, role, and impact. • Showcase skills: tie them to job requirements. • Conclude with future goals and eagerness for the role. How will you ensure your slides align with the job's core needs? #presentation #careerdevelopment #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
